parameters.description: Send notifications to your own Splunk On-Call destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise victorops:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway / gateway-plus transformer channels instead POST a native VictorOps alert payload directly to your REST endpoint, bypassing Apprise.
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment Splunk On-Call destinations, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your Splunk On-Call REST endpoint (no Apprise)
parameters.gateway_url_plus: ${ customer_secrets.VICTOROPS_BASE ?? https://alert.victorops.com }/integrations/generic/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.apikey_secret }} }/alert/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.routing_key_secret }} }

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Splunk On-Call API key (api_id path segment)

routing_key_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's Splunk On-Call routing key
